title: Tim Belden
compiled_truth: Tim Belden is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-21), Tim Belden sent 221 and received 3493 emails, totalling 3714 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (61), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (53), [Jeff Richter](people/jeff-richter) (41), [Robert Badeer](people/robert-badeer) (37), [Sean Crandall](people/sean-crandall) (37). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, belden, bill_williams_iii, california_issues, credit, cya.
